description: SendGrid is an email delivery platform for transactional and marketing email, with tools for sending, analytics, deliverability, and account management. It is part of Twilio and provides APIs and related tooling for managing email operations.
summary: SendGrid exposes HTTP APIs for email delivery/management, including a documented v3 API and a separate Email Activity (beta) API surface, plus a legacy npm-based CLI; all discovered developer surfaces require authentication.
